/AuXLH.defaultMessage: Install the connector in Piwigo, open it from here, authorize Canva, copy the connector token, then paste it below.
/AuXLH.description: Explanation shown before the user connects their Piwigo Connector.

0waSes.description: Label for the Piwigo instance URL input.

81nHDV.description: Button label to remove the saved Piwigo Connector token from Canva.

Fx6W6n.defaultMessage: No photos directly in this album. If it is a parent folder, choose a sub-album.

I/ZSes.description: Title of the Piwigo connection screen.

ZL/lgK.description: Label for the Piwigo Connector token input.

ZoDGME.description: Status text showing the connected Piwigo URL.

ZxC125.description: Error shown when a Piwigo image cannot be inserted into Canva.

c8LYuC.description: Status text shown when the total number of Piwigo photos is unknown.

cdEpu/.description: Title of the connected Piwigo media browser.

mXD4R6.description: Fallback alt text for an inserted Piwigo image with no title or filename.

o9rV8j.description: Confirmation shown after exporting a Canva design to Piwigo.
